title: 基础 web search 与 dynamic filtering 对比
title_en: Basic Web Search vs Dynamic Filtering

body.itemA: 基础 web search（web_search_20250305）：搜索结果全量加载进 context window，Claude 在完整 HTML 上推理。所有模型可用，不依赖 code execution。
body.itemB: Dynamic filtering（web_search_20260209）：Claude 先写代码过滤搜索结果，只将相关内容放入 context。token 消耗更低，回答更精准。需要同时启用 code_execution tool，仅限 Opus 4.6 和 Sonnet 4.6。

dimensions.name: context 内容
dimensions.b: 经代码过滤后的相关片段

dimensions.name: 模型支持
dimensions.a: 所有支持 web search 的模型

dimensions.name: 适合场景
dimensions.b: 技术文档搜索、文献综述、研究验证

body_en.itemA: Basic web search (web_search_20250305): Full search results are loaded into the context window. Claude reasons over complete HTML. Available on all supported models, no code execution dependency.
body_en.itemB: Dynamic filtering (web_search_20260209): Claude writes code to filter search results, loading only relevant content into context. Lower token usage, more accurate answers. Requires code_execution tool, only Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6.

dimensions.name: Model support
dimensions.a: All models with web search support

dimensions.name: Best for
dimensions.b: Technical docs, literature review, research verification
